Hey, it keeps doing this.

And you're just eking out little gains, and then one thing works, and something else breaks.
So I think that there's a portion of the calibration phase that if you've been working with AI for a while, you're just kind of comfortable with, and you know what to look for.

And then there's what we call polishing instructions, which is when you get into the post-processing phase, before an editor takes a full pass at it, making sure that those little gotchas are captured there just to make sure.
